topic: identifying fractions of a whole using circle models
latex: Which of the shaded regions below represents $\frac{4}{7}$ of the whole circle?
diagram_notes: Four circles labeled A, B, C, D, each divided into 7 equal parts (shown with tick marks around the circumference). Circle A has 2 parts shaded. Circle B has 6 parts shaded. Circle C has 4 parts shaded (correct answer - represents 4/7). Circle D has 1 part shaded. All shading is gray and the circles have small tick marks on the outside edge to indicate the equal divisions.
